text:
uefisign(8):

EXAMPLES
     Generate self-signed certificate and use it to sign a binary:
           /usr/share/examples/uefisign/uefikeys testcert
           uefisign -c testcert.pem -k testcert.key -o signed-binary binary

# /usr/share/examples/uefisign/uefikeys testcert
/bin/sh: /usr/share/examples/uefisign/uefikeys: Permission denied

# pkg which /usr/share/examples/uefisign/uefikeys
/usr/share/examples/uefisign/uefikeys was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-14.snap20230414190745
